name: leaftab-grid
description: Folder-aware desktop-style grid engine and React adapters extracted from Leaftab.

scripts.custom-theme:dev: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run dev --workspace @leaftab/grid-custom-theme-example --
scripts.custom-theme:build: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-custom-theme-example
scripts.leaftab-like:dev: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run dev --workspace @leaftab/grid-leaftab-like-example --
scripts.leaftab-like:build: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-leaftab-like-example
scripts.quality:core: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run test --workspace @leaftab/grid-core
scripts.quality:react: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run test --workspace @leaftab/grid-react
scripts.quality:preset: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run test --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab
scripts.quality:examples: npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-minimal-example && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-minimal-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-leaftab-like-example && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-leaftab-like-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-custom-theme-example && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-custom-theme-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @leaftab/grid-showcase && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-showcase
scripts.quality:ordered: npm run quality:core && npm run quality:react && npm run quality:preset && npm run quality:examples && npm run quality:publishability
scripts.showcase:dev: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run dev --workspace @leaftab/grid-showcase --
scripts.showcase:build: npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-core && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-react && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-preset-leaftab && npm run build --workspace @leaftab/grid-showcase
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test && node scripts/verify-packages.mjs
